sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101243" key="suri/ggwma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡρίγγ-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n101243.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fistula</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:110:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">110.37</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
